testcase.name: tests.test_api_drivers
testcase.error: D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\python.py:507: in importtestmodule mod = import_path( D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\pathlib.py:587: in import_path importlib.import_module(module_name) D:\os\Python312\Lib\importlib\__init__.py:90: in import_module return _bootstrap._gcd_import(name[level:], package, level) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1381: in _gcd_import ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1354: in _find_and_load ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1325: in _find_and_load_unlocked ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:929: in _load_unlocked ??? D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\assertion\rewrite.py:188: in exec_module source_stat, co = _rewrite_test(fn, self.config) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\assertion\rewrite.py:359: in _rewrite_test co = compile(tree, strfn, "exec", dont_inherit=True) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E File "E:\硕腾网络\PyGBSentry\EdgeLite\EdgeLite-v1.0-Community\tests\test_api_drivers.py", line 26 E from __future__ import annotations E ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E SyntaxError: from __future__ imports must occur at the beginning of the file
